name: Ruthheim
startIntroPart1: Against raging blizzards and endless hordes of monsters, the great Principality of Ruthheim has stood firm as a rock for centuries. Now, alongside its valiant wolves, the great northern realm stands ready to rise once more.
startIntroPart2: With the radiant sword warriors 'Polarglaive', do you have what it takes to bring the world under your kingdom's rule?
attacked: The raging blizzards of the North shall show you no mercy!
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: We bestow you the honor of this trade offer.
denounced: The accusations of primitive lifeforms are beneath us.
